description_long: This is a stylized child figure with a youthful build, standing upright with arms extended slightly outward. The child is dressed in a sleeveless top featuring floral and decorative patterns, paired with a short skirt that also displays ornate designs. The figure has short, dark hair styled into two round buns on either side of the head, giving a playful and distinctive appearance. The child is barefoot, with visible toes and fingers, and the skin tone is light. The overall design is smooth and cartoon-like, with simplified anatomical features and no visible accessories or carried items. The figure's clothing and hairstyle suggest a casual, summery look suitable for outdoor urban environments.
description: A stylized child figure with short hair in two buns, wearing a sleeveless patterned top and a short skirt, standing barefoot with arms outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view showing the child's face, sleeveless top with floral patterns, skirt, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the round hair bun, and the side of the outfit.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the back of the head with two buns, the sleeveless top, and the skirt's rear design.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, hair bun, and the side of the clothing similar to the left view.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless crop top and short skirt with decorative patterns
attribute_hairstyle: short straight hair styled into two round buns
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly extended outward
